body:
This is a mod for Minecraft that adds RPG-like stats to the game

How It Works:

- Earn XP by playing normally.
- Each level gives +3 stat points.
- Open the stat menu to assign points.
- Use the “Limit Stats” button to cap your stats to your preferred max.

Stats Overview:

- Constitution – Extra HP, fall damage resistance
- Dexterity – Movement speed, swim speed, attack speed
- Strength – Increases melee damage and knockback
- Vitality – Adds regeneration and armor
- Endurance – Boosts armor toughness, lowers hunger cost, adds knockback resistance

Supports both singleplayer and multiplayer
Everything is configerable!

Join the discord for bug reports and suggestions:
https://discord.gg/qCRfkSyyTq
